notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango grounds into a double play, shortstop Francisco Lindor to second baseman Brett Baty to first baseman Jared Young. Alejandro Kirk out at 2nd. Yohendrick Piñango out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field. Daulton Varsho scores. Alejandro Kirk scores.
